title: JayyMovies Official Resource Pack
description: This is the official resource pack used by @JayyMovies on Youtube!
body:
This is the OFFICIAL JayyMovies Resource Pack.

This pack adds the following:
- Custom GUIs 🎨
- Dark Mode! 🌘
- Low shield 🛡
- Low fire 🔥
- Custom ore textures 💎
- Custom apple textures 🍎
- Custom bow texture 🏹
- Saturated armor/tools 🌈
- Custom wood/stone tools 🪓
- Custom trident 🔱
- Custom enchant glint 🌟
- Custom totem 🌸
- Darker elytra 🚀
- And more! ➕

It also includes features from VanillaTweaks, which you can find here: https://vanillatweaks.net

If you enjoy my content on YouTube (https://youtube.com/@JayyMovies) then this is the perfect pack to use and show support, this texture pack is minimal and verry pleasant to use still making the game look like Minecraft with QOL tweaks :)

If you want to see exactly what this pack changes without having to download it and try it yourself, then you can watch the video showcase on YouTube here: https://youtu.be/OXFlhjgzh5M?si=wKkmw_02874iuxaU
